title: Flow of Decision Making with Python Conditions
description: A flowchart illustrating how program execution flows through different conditional statements (if, elif, else) in Python based on Boolean evaluation.
relationships: Program execution evaluates the condition; if True, it executes the 'if block' then jumps to 'Continue Program Execution'. If False, it checks subsequent 'elif blocks' for a True condition. If no conditions are met, it executes the 'else block' before continuing.
